auth_methods.description: Use your ChatGPT login with Codex CLI (requires a paid ChatGPT subscription)
auth_methods.name: Login with ChatGPT

configOptions.description: Choose an approval and sandboxing preset for your session
configOptions.name: Approval Preset

options.description: Codex can read files in the current workspace. Approval is required to edit files or access the internet.
options.name: Read Only

options.description: Codex can read and edit files in the current workspace, and run commands. Approval is required to access the internet or edit other files. (Identical to Agent mode)
options.name: Default

options.description: Codex can edit files outside this workspace and access the internet without asking for approval. Exercise caution when using.
options.name: Full Access

options.description: Latest frontier agentic coding model.

options.name: gpt-5.3-codex

options.description: Ultra-fast coding model.
options.name: GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark

options.description: Optimized for professional work and long-running agents
options.name: gpt-5.2

configOptions.name: Reasoning Effort

options.description: Fast responses with lighter reasoning
options.name: Low

options.description: Balances speed and reasoning depth for everyday tasks
options.name: Medium

options.description: Greater reasoning depth for complex problems
options.name: High

options.name: Xhigh

content.text: Neutral seed prompt preserved in loaded history.
Neutral seed response preserved in loaded history.

jsonrpc_error.message: official ACP SDK error from codex during session/load

expected_consumer_error.message: official ACP SDK error from codex during session/load

provider_caveats: Official ACP SDK owns raw JSON-RPC transport; Conduit observes consumer command/response/event frames at the WebSocket product boundary, not private SDK transport frames.
Curated replay preserves the scenario-specific response/event semantics while replacing local provider state with scrubbed ids, cwds, and titles.

Fixture promotion preserved the live direct ACP load-time replay variant order user_message_chunk then agent_message_chunk and omitted only private text, raw session ids, local cwd, auth metadata, and provider dumps.
dynamic_ignored_fields: prompt text chunks when provider tokenization differs

preserved_semantics: load-time session/update replay precedes session/load response
LoadSessionResponse object shape with configOptions and modes
continuation prompt accepted only after the replay fake provider matched loaded history variants and neutral text markers
accepted_contract_drift: narrative docs show null result; locked schema accepts object response
live Codex summary included models; current locked schema marks model state unstable and Conduit preserves schema-stable fields here

red_first_proof.why_correct: The fake provider emitted load-time session/update frames before the session/load response, but the current Conduit WebSocket snapshot did not expose a loaded transcript read model.
